signals.reasoning: BTC is the strongest major on the board with negative funding, trade-grade mechanical score, and price/OI still reading trend-supported rather than exhausted. On a CLEAR board this is the cleanest actual long vehicle.

ETH still has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but the price/OI label is short-covering-rally rather than clean trend-supported continuation and overcrowding is already elevated. Good underlying tape, but not as clean as BTC for a fresh entry.
SOL remains constructive and trend-supported, but the setup is less differentiated than BTC and not strong enough to force as a primary long on this board. Better as watch-only.
TST has already run too far with positive funding and high squeeze/cascade risk, which makes it a poor fresh long despite bullish tape. Too extended to chase cleanly.
LDO still has constructive recovery structure, but positive funding and high cascade risk make the reward-to-risk less attractive than the stronger squeeze names. Keep it on the watchlist.
FARTCOIN remains active and trend-supported, but it is still more of a noisy momentum continuation than a clean fresh entry. Not strong enough to upgrade over BTC/XPL/KNEIRO.
MERL is rebounding well, but positive funding and elevated cascade risk make it a weaker follow-through long than the top names on the sheet. Watch-only.

STBL is now very crowded on the long side with positive funding, high OI-to-volume, and elevated overcrowding, so even though price is still trend-supported it is too dangerous to chase. Also too late to recommend as a fresh short while momentum is still up.

KNEIRO is one of the strongest raw squeeze setups on the sheet with deeply negative funding and a trade-grade score. It is thinner and less proven than BTC, so confidence stays lower, but on a CLEAR board it is a legitimate secondary long.

MAVIA is the clearest crowded-long fade on the board with extremely positive funding and very high OI-to-volume, while the mechanical score is not bullish. It is not a high-conviction short, but if there is a bearish lean here this is the cleanest one.
GRIFFAIN is too damaged for a clean long and too squeeze-prone for a clean fresh short given negative funding. Better to leave it alone.
PENGU is improving but does not have enough edge versus the stronger buy candidates. Hold/watch only.
BABY has mildly constructive tape and slightly negative funding, but the setup is still less compelling than the top squeeze names. Not strong enough to upgrade.
WLD is heavily overcrowded on the long side with positive funding and trend-supported price, which makes it awkward in both directions. Too late to chase, too strong to short cleanly.

CHILLGUY is the only name with a genuinely bearish mechanical read, and the price/OI pattern still looks like short-covering rather than healthy upside continuation. That makes it a reasonable reduced-confidence short lean on a mostly long-leaning board.
ZEREBRO looks more like recovery noise than a clean continuation or a clean failure. Not strong enough to act on.
FOGO also reads as short-covering rather than true leadership, so the setup is too messy for a fresh signal. Hold only.

XPL is one of the better secondary longs with negative funding, trade-grade score, and trend-supported price/OI. It is still a thinner alt, so confidence stays below BTC, but the setup is strong enough to upgrade on a CLEAR board.
PEOPLE is improving but still not differentiated enough to justify a fresh signal over the stronger names. Watch-only.
CAKE has constructive recovery structure, but positive funding and high cascade risk keep it below the bar for a clean fresh long. Not an upgrade.
